name: Claude Opus 4.5
metaDescription: Claude Opus 4.5 (Anthropic), released 2025-11-24 — part of the Claude Opus line. Completed the Claude 4.5 family; positioned as Anthropic's most intelligent mo…
overview: Claude Opus 4.5 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Opus line. Released 2025-11-24. Anthropic's flagship Claude tier — most capable Opus-class model for the hardest reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agentic work.

What's notable in this version: Completed the Claude 4.5 family; positioned as Anthropic's most intelligent model at launch with a roughly two-thirds price cut versus Opus 4.1. Added the effort parameter.
